name: [smoke] renders text content variant without crashing
[smoke] renders image variant without crashing
[smoke] renders icon variant without crashing
[smoke] renders all canonical sizes without crashing
[smoke] renders all three content types at every size without crashing
[fn] two-word alt shows both initials in order
[fn] single-word alt shows exactly one initial — not two
[fn] three-word alt shows FIRST TWO initials only, not all three
[fn] initials are uppercase even when alt is all-lowercase
[fn] empty alt does not crash and shows no initials text
[fn] text variant at 2xs does NOT render initials — falls back to icon

name: [fn] text variant at xs does NOT render initials — falls back to icon
suite: Avatar — text-to-icon fallback at small sizes

name: [fn] high attention renders non-transparent background
[fn] medium attention renders non-transparent background
[fn] low attention renders transparent background (ghost style)
[fn] high and medium attention backgrounds are visually distinct colours
[fn] icon variant — high and medium attention produce different icon fill colours
[fn] icon variant — low attention container is transparent
[fn] image variant has transparent background while src is valid
[fn] image element is a11y-hidden — prevents screen reader double-announcement
[fn] image error: image element is removed from tree
[fn] image error: container keeps image role and label after fallback
[fn] image error: background switches from transparent to paint colour
[fn] icon variant container has image role
[fn] icon SVG is a11y-hidden — only one image element announced
[fn] disabled sets opacity to exactly 0.5
[fn] non-disabled has full opacity of 1
[fn] disabled icon variant also has opacity 0.5
[fn] container side matches spacing token for each canonical size
[fn] sizes are strictly increasing from 2xs to 2xl
[fn] width and height are equal (square container for circular clipping)
[fn] cornerRadius=none overrides border radius to 0 (square avatar)
[fn] default (no recipe) renders with non-zero border radius (pill/circle)
[fn] customSize=64 produces a 64px container
[fn] customSize=0 produces an invisible avatar — zero is not nullish so fallback is skipped
[fn] negative customSize passes through without clamping — produces invalid dimensions
[fn] icon content with string fallback renders that text without crashing
[fn] image content with no src renders string fallback as text — not the default icon
[fn] text content with blank alt and no fallback renders empty Text node — no person icon shown
[fn] testID prop is forwarded to root View
[fn] testID is used to derive sub-element test IDs
[fn] alt with a leading space extracts the correct initial
[fn] alt with double internal space still produces two-letter initials
[fn] numeric alt produces digit initials — digits are truthy so filter keeps them
[a11y] text variant container has image role
[a11y] icon variant container has image role
[a11y] image variant container has image role
[a11y] alt prop maps to accessibilityLabel for all three content types
[a11y] empty alt uses "avatar" fallback label — never silent
[a11y] disabled=true sets accessibilityState.disabled to true
[a11y] non-disabled has accessibilityState.disabled false
[a11y] disabled icon variant sets accessibilityState.disabled
